name: Macaroni with Broccoli & Blue Cheese Sauce
recipeIngredient: 1 1/2 cups Stilton or other blue cheese
recipeInstructions:
1. Cook the macaroni until just cooked.
2. Cook broccoli for 3 minutes in boiling salted water.
3. Melt margarine, add flour, mustard, salt, and pepper; cook for 2 minutes, stirring occasionally.
4. Gradually add milk with a whisk. Stir briskly until smooth.
5. Remove from the heat; stir in yogurt and blue cheese.
6. Reserve a few tablespoons of sauce for the top. Mix the remaining sauce into the macaroni, gently folding in the broccoli.
7. Grease an ovenproof dish, fill with the mixture, spread the remaining sauce on top, and bake for 20 minutes at 350.
